svg.title: PasteCV full-stack project structure
svg.desc: Module breakdown of PasteCV organized as frontend, backend, AI layer, database, and DevOps with team ownership and file paths

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PasteCV landing page module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PasteCV portfolio renderer module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PasteCV theme system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PasteCV share and preview module')
sendPrompt('Explain the resume ingestion API route in PasteCV')
sendPrompt('Explain the portfolio save and slug API in PasteCV')
sendPrompt('Explain the PDF export API in PasteCV')
sendPrompt('Show me a sample Gemini Flash prompt for resume parsing')
sendPrompt('Explain the resume schema and TypeScript types for PasteCV')
sendPrompt('How should PasteCV handle Gemini API errors and retries?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Supabase schema for PasteCV portfolios table')
sendPrompt('How should PasteCV use Supabase storage for uploaded PDFs?')
sendPrompt('Should PasteCV use Supabase auth? What is the minimal setup?')

g.text: main branch → Vercel auto-deploy · preview URLs on every PR

svg.text: Click any module to learn more ↑
Data flow: User input → API route → AI parse → Save to DB → Render at /[slug]
Stack: Next.js · Gemini Flash · Supabase · Tailwind · Vercel
